extensionDescription.message: Go tokafatsa mokwalo wa Searabia wa porofeshenale mo websaeteng nngwe le nngwe. E tokafatsa pharologanyo ya ditlhaka, e tsentse difonti tse di ntle tsa Searabia, mme e baakanya mathata a go itshupa a a bakang gore mokwalo wa Searabia o kgaogane.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Tsenya kgotsa tima katoloso ya Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Pharologanyo ya ditlhaka e ka metlha e bewa mo go 0 go thibela go kgaogana ga ditlhaka tsa Searabia. Se ke sone sone se se bakang seemo sa Searabia se se senyegileng thata mo webo.

forceRTLDescription.message: E tlhama tsela ya kwa molemeng mo dikarolong tsa mokwalo wa Searabia. Tsenya mo websaeteng mo Searabia se itsegeng ka phoso go tswa kwa molemeng.

diacriticsDescription.message: E tokafatsa ponagalo ya matshwao a medumo ya Searabia (tashkeel) go thibela go kgaolwa kwa godimo le kwa tlase ga mothaladi wa mokwalo.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Dirisa fonta e e farologaneng mo websaeteng e

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Tlhopha fonta e e farologaneng fela mo websaeteng e, o tlola seemo sa gago sa lefatshe lotlhe.

exceptionsEmpty.message: Ga go na diwebsaete tse di timilweng.

fontSourceNote.message: Difonti di newa ke Google Fonts. Go tlhokega kgokagano ya maranyane go laola ntlha ya ntlha.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Dikopo tsa fonta di romelwa kwa di serving tsa Google. Bona fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Mokwalo wa Searabia o lemogilwe — $COUNT$ dintlha di baakantswe.

statusGlobalMode.message: Go dirisiwa mokgwa wa lefatshe lotlhe — matshwao a lang/dir a fitlhetswe.

statusNoArabic.message: Ga go na mokwalo wa Searabia o o lemogilweng mo tsebeng e.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: Ga go kgone go tsena mo tsebeng e.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Tlosa $HOSTNAME$ mo diwebsaeteng tse di timilweng
